reviews.review_description: It is a very good game if you love Harry Potter and you want to be like the Harry Potter but the game is a little violent and people can speak to each other and you can only hear ther voice and you have no idea how is actually behind that voice so if you are not 22 years old you should not play this game and any parents out there do not buy this game if your child is under 22 years old and 5 stars for the game itself but 1 star for how many children could be talking to someone bad and is it was not for the Seattle police I would never seen my friends children ever again.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for your detailed feedback. We take safety concerns very seriously — especially when it comes to voice chat and younger players. We already provide tools like muting, blocking, and reporting, but we understand there's always room for improvement. If you have specific suggestions or would like to share more details about the incident you mentioned (with Seattle PD), please reach out to us directly at warofwizardsvr@gmail.com or through our in-game Discord channel. We'd like to look into this further. Thank you for helping us keep our community safer.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for your feedback. We don't tolerate any malicious behavior or disrespect. If you encounter issues, please use the in-game reporting system, and we will review and take action. If you have video evidence, you can  send it to us via Discord — that will help us investigate more efficiently. Your input is crucial to us, and if there's anything we can help with, please feel free to reach out to us on Discord.

reviews.review_title: Months of engaging content for low cost
reviews.review_description:
It's Pretty F2P,and it's hard to "finish" the game so getting every spell can take months so fun to keep up with, around every month or so there's a new update.
There's VC,which I don't use often but nice to have. It's a game that has a Meta to keep up with but it only changes every so often, like 3 to 4 weeks so it isn't overwhelming either, and with the constant balance changes doesn't make Meta too overpowering.
Great game.

reviews.review_description: pretty good man

This game is genuinely great. War Of Wizards: Apprentice Edition has pretty much all the same core aspects as the normal $15–$20 version, but it’s free, which already makes it a huge win. The only real spending option is for unlimited 2v2s, and even that is cheaper than buying the full game, so it still feels very fair and optional.

The gameplay itself is super fun and surprisingly deep. There’s a strong competitive element that keeps you coming back, but it never feels stale or boring. Matches stay exciting, and learning different spells, strategies, and playstyles makes every fight feel a little different.

The community is mostly great. You’ll run into a lot of kind and helpful people, especially for a VR game. Every once in a while you’ll meet someone who gets overly mad or can’t control their anger, but that’s honestly a small portion of the player base—probably like 5%. Overall, the positive players far outweigh the negative ones.

One of the best parts is how often the game gets updated. The developers clearly care, and it shows. Whether it’s new troop skins, maps, spells, or spell skins, the constant updates keep the game fresh and exciting and give you something new to look forward to.

Overall, this is an amazing free VR game. It’s fun, competitive, addictive in a good way, and doesn’t get boring. I 100% recommend this game to anyone thinking about getting it—especially since it’s free. If you’re even slightly interested, it’s absolutely worth trying.

reviews.review_description: REFUSED to uninstall now I can’t use my headset anymore.

developer_response.body: Hey ilikepotatos.19898! Sorry to hear about the trouble with your headset. That sounds frustrating. Since the uninstall issue is preventing your Meta device from working, this is most likely related to Meta's own system software or drivers, which our game doesn't control. We recommend contacting Meta Support​ directly for the fastest fix—they're best equipped to handle this. If you think something in our game specifically triggered it, feel free to share clip via our in-game Discord, and we'll look into it. Hope this helps get things sorted!
